rationale: Art. VIII §1-p authorizes exemption of precious metal in depositories. It does not address residence homestead exemptions, so no conflict arises from increasing the §11.13(b) exemption amount.
quote: The legislature by general law may exempt from ad valorem taxation precious metal held in a precious metal depository located in this state.
_note: Rule text concerns precious metal depository exemptions only; homestead exemption authority derives from separate constitutional provisions (e.g., art. VIII §1-b).
